name: tell-your-children
description: Alex Berenson's 'Tell Your Children: The Truth About Marijuana, Mental Illness, and Violence' — an investigation into the links between high-THC marijuana and serious mental illness, challenging the narrative that pot is harmless.
useCase: Understand the evidence on high-THC marijuana, psychosis risk, addiction, and the public health consequences of legalization.
knownRisks: Controversial topic — Berenson's conclusions are disputed by some researchers and legalization advocates
One perspective — readers should seek out multiple sources on this contentious issue
May be triggering for those with family members affected by substance use or mental illness
